acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in a Top 20 data-dependent acquisition mode
fractionation method: strong cation exchange chromatography (SCX) was used to fractionate the sample
fragmentation method: high-resolution MS2 scans that were generated by HCD
instrument: analyzed on a LTQ Velos-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: the resulting peptides were labeled with TMT
